## What / Why

Short description of the change and its motivation.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] No new secrets committed
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant
